name: auto-model-trainer
description: Long-horizon autonomous ML model training for Claude Code. Uses a Stop hook to drive an autonomous convergence loop -- Claude cannot stop until two-tier convergence (within-class exhaustion + cross-class coverage) passes. Explores multiple experiment variants in parallel via Dynamic Workflows and git worktrees, tracks lineage with SHA fingerprints, detects diminishing returns mechanically, and produces a final evidence-based report with Kaggle submission.csv.
